prompt: A cute minimalist portrait of a young woman sitting casually on the floor in a clean studio setting with a light grey background. She wears an oversized dark charcoal hoodie, cream straight-leg pants, white socks, and chunky white sneakers. Relaxed seated pose with crossed legs, one eye slightly closed in a playful wink and a soft smile. Behind her, a large black-and-white doodle character hugs her from behind, wrapping its cartoon arms around her shoulders and gently squeezing her cheek. The doodle figure has a simple round head, tiny eyes, and a hand-drawn sketch style. Soft studio lighting, modern aesthetic, playful and wholesome mood, minimalist composition, high-quality fashion portrait, realistic photography, subtle shadows, ultra-detailed, clean background, candid expression.
